description: You are a cybercrime investigator analyzing a suspect's storage device at /home/ga/evidence/suspect_drive.dd. Locate and extract all user-created hidden Alternate Data Streams (ADS), ignoring standard NTFS system metadata streams like $BadClus:$Bad or $Secure:$SDS. Document the findings in a pipe-delimited CSV at /home/ga/Reports/ads_findings.csv with the header 'PARENT_FILENAME|STREAM_NAME|STREAM_CONTENT', using only base filenames for the parent files. Provide a summary report at /home/ga/Reports/ads_summary.txt containing 'TOTAL_ADS_FOUND: <N>' and 'INVESTIGATION_CONCLUSION: <brief assessment of the payloads>'. For the analysis, use Autopsy (case 'ADS_Investigation_2024', number 'INV-ADS-009') or Sleuth Kit CLI tools.
